description: Configure analytics tracking codes and monitoring settings for your website.

fields.name: google_analytics_id
fields.label: Google Analytics Tracking ID
fields.help: Your Google Analytics measurement ID (GA4 or Universal Analytics).

fields.name: facebook_pixel_id
fields.label: Facebook Pixel ID
fields.help: Your Facebook Pixel ID for conversion tracking.

fields.name: enable_visit_counter
fields.label: Enable Visit Counter
fields.help: Counts page visits in a local database.

fields.name: track_outbound_links
fields.label: Track Outbound Links
fields.help: Automatically tracks when users click on external links.

fields.name: custom_head_code
fields.label: Custom Head Tracking Code
fields.help: Any custom tracking code to be added in the <head> section.

fields.name: custom_body_code
fields.label: Custom Body Tracking Code
fields.help: Any custom tracking code to be added at the end of <body>.

fields.name: analytics_position
fields.label: Analytics Script Position
fields.help: Where to place the analytics tracking scripts.
